_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in designing Test and Evaluation Strategies (TES)
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Skill AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.536), RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.531).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [designing, skill, strategies]. NICE-only terms [evaluation, tes, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, engineering, evaluating, few, generation, output] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.887, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in designing Test and Evaluation Strategies (TES)" and "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.597 > STS 0.547 (gap +0.050). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [designing, skill, strategies] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 23.8%. Shared tokens: [designing, skill, strategies]. NICE-only: [evaluation, tes, test]. WIDAI-only: [chain, engineering, evaluating, few, generation, output].

signals.detail: STS 0.547 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
